case_title: HENRY GUSTAVO ENRIQUEZ VS. RICHARD TICAS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENRIQUEZ, HENRY GUSTAVO AS TO DEFENDANT TICAS, RICHARD IND & DBA TICAS ENTERPRISES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENRIQUEZ, HENRY GUSTAVO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TICAS, RICHARD IND & DBA TICAS ENTERPRISES $6,888.58 PRINCIPAL, $90.42 INTEREST, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,083.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
